List every catalog ref with the source and catalog snapshot keys it
resolves to.

Refs include the canonical current/main/latest pointers plus any
branches/<name> and prs/<n> refs written by 'orun catalog refresh'. Output is
sorted by ref name. An empty store prints an empty list (exit 0).

Examples:
  orun catalog refs
  orun catalog refs --json

Usage:
  orun catalog refs [flags]

Flags:
      --json   Stable machine-readable output

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
